channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nigerian security leaders call for end to ethnic profiling, urge inclusive language for unity and peace
item.description: High-ranking Nigerian security officers and policy experts from Beacon Security and Intelligence Limited (BSIL) and the Whiteink Institute for Strategy Education and Research (WISER) don gather for Ab...

item.title: NDDC and Niger Delta Chamber Leaders Call for More Local Investment to Boost Regional GDP
item.description: The Chairman of the Niger Delta Chamber of Commerce, Trade, Mines and Agriculture (NDCCTMA), Ambassador Idaere Gogo Ogan, and the Managing Director of the Niger Delta Development Commission (NDDC), Dr...

item.title: Lawsuit Accuses San Bernardino Officer of Slamming Handcuffed Teen and Falsifying Reports
item.description: An 18-year-old woman, Erin Marie Cowser, has filed a civil rights lawsuit against the San Bernardino Police Department, accusing an officer of using excessive force and fabricating reports following a...

item.title: Artemis II Mission Follows Optimized Figure-Eight Trajectory for Safe Lunar Flyby and Return
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission, launched on April 2, 2026, aboard the Space Launch System rocket, carried four astronauts—Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and Jeremy Hansen—beyond low Earth orb...

item.title: Arsenal Lose FA Cup Quarter-Final to Southampton, Miss Out on Prize Money
item.description: Arsenal suffered a major disappointment after being knocked out of the FA Cup by Southampton in the quarter-final stage on April 4, 2026. The Premier League leaders were defeated at St. Mary's Stadium...

item.title: Air Canada to Implement $50 Fuel Surcharge on Select Vacation Packages from April 6
item.description: Air Canada Vacations, the airline's holiday package subsidiary, will introduce a $50 fuel surcharge per passenger for trips to designated sunny destinations starting April 6, 2026. This surcharge, whi...

item.title: NDLEA arrests Celestial Church pastor and wife for transporting 11kg of skunk in Lagos
item.description: For Lagos, NDLEA don arrest Pastor Afolabi Hodonu, 45, leader of Celestial Church of Christ at Agonvi Sea Beach, Sakpo area, Badagry, and him wife, Success Hodonu, 35, after 11 kilograms of skunk cann...

item.title: BC Ferries suspends Horseshoe Bay–Langdale route due to mechanical issue
item.description: BC Ferries announced the cancellation of sailings between Horseshoe Bay and Langdale on April 5, 2026, due to a mechanical issue affecting one of the vessels operating the Sunshine Coast route. Accord...

item.title: US special forces rescue downed US airman deep inside Iran after Iran closes vital Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US President Donald Trump has issued a new round of fiery threats against Iran, warning he will strike the country’s power plants and bridges if the Strait of Hormuz is not opened to shipping by a Tue...

item.title: Iranian Cultural Centre in Dar es Salaam Preserves Persian Heritage and History
item.description: Dar es Salaam still keeps some mystery despite all the new buildings and modern life. Among its old cultural spots, the Iranian Cultural Centre along Ali Hassan Mwinyi Road is one of those quiet gems....

item.title: TS Galaxy secure Nedbank Cup final spot after tense shootout win over Milford FC
item.description: TS Galaxy have advanced to the Nedbank Cup final for the second time in their history after edging Milford FC 4-3 on penalties in a gripping semi-final played at Solomon Mahlangu Stadium in KwaMhlanga...

item.title: Rivers State Outlines Investment Opportunities Through BRACED Commission
item.description: The Director-General of the Rivers State Investment Promotion Agency (RSIPA), Dr. Chamberlain Peterside, don carry the chance use the revived BRACED Commission to showcase new investment opportunities...

item.title: Karachi Board delays matric exams to April 10 due to administrative issues
item.description: The Board of Secondary Education Karachi (BSEK) has officially postponed the matriculation exams, which were earlier scheduled for April 7, to now start on April 10. The decision came after a request ...

item.title: Public Finds Police Firearms Accidentally Left Outside London Mayor Sadiq Khan’s Residence
item.description: A man has criticised the security team protecting London Mayor Sadiq Khan after discovering a bag of police firearms left unattended near the mayor’s south London home. Jordan Griffiths, aged 30, said...

item.title: OJ da Juiceman Released from Jail, Plans Music Comeback After Arrest
item.description: Rapper OJ da Juiceman has been released from jail after spending a few weeks in custody following his March arrest. Authorities had accused him of pointing a gun at a Georgia State Patrol officer whil...

item.title: Australian jewellery brand finds success with Gen Z shoppers
item.description: Hannah Vasicek, the founder of a homegrown jewellery business in Hobart, has turned her passion for handmade pieces into a thriving enterprise. She began selling her creations at Salamanca Market, bal...

item.title: Iran‑Israel war escalates as Trump sets deadline for Strait of Hormuz, OPEC+ warns of oil‑market volatility
item.description: Tensions in West Asia have sharply escalated on April 5, 2026, as the Iran‑Israel‑U.S. war intensifies. U.S. President Donald Trump said there is a 'good chance' of making a deal with Iran by April 6 ...

item.title: Australia secures fuel supply commitments from Japan, South Korea and Singapore amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Australia has received assurances from key fuel-exporting nations in Asia that petroleum and fuel shipments will continue without disruption, even as the conflict in Iran threatens global energy suppl...

item.title: Wes Moore voices opposition to Trump’s plans for Medicare spending reductions
item.description: During a recent campaign event in Maryland, Governor Wes Moore criticized former President Donald Trump for signaling potential cuts to Medicare as part of his proposed federal budget adjustments. Moo...

item.title: LTFRB orders continued roadworthiness inspections of PUVs after Holy Week travel
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has directed its regional offices to continue checking public utility vehicles (PUVs) for roadworthiness following the Holy Week holida...
